title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY testing 159.19 resistance — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: EUR/USD
text: EUR/USD holding above 1.1711 — ECB rate at 2% and Fed rate at 3.75% may weigh on EUR/USD; rate divergence favours USD.

title: CFTC — EUR
text: EUR net long position at 77.3% — institutional positioning may lead to a squeeze; watch for potential reversal.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 19.2 signals low volatility — not a risk-off environment; S&P 500 trading at 6,817.

title: USD/JPY vs VIX
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break at +0.654 — JPY no longer acting as safe haven; watch for potential regime shift.
